ratings.comment: She is very nice and approachable. Lectures are a bit boring because she just writes reactions on an overhead the whole time and you copy them down. Lot of memorization and repetition required to do well on the exam.
Really sweet lady and great lecturer, but the exam is REALLY difficult.  As much as she says it's not "rote memorization," be ready to re-read and re-write your notes a LOT before it sinks in.
Extremely helpful and really wants everybody to understand the material.

I really liked the way she taught.  She writes everything down so you don't miss a thing and she makes everything crystal clear.  Exam is hard since you need to know every little detail to metabolism but everything is straight forward without surprises.
She teaches parts of BioMolChem 503 and Medical Mycology 410.  She's really cool, lectures on her material in a way you can follow w/out a problem, and is crazy friendly.
